zh.lifeSummary: 當Yolande de Dampierre於1324年出生在法國福藍德 福藍薩時，她的父親Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle49歲，母親Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany28歲。她於從1352年到1353年與Philippe de Navarre Comte de Longueville結婚。她去世於1395年12月13日享年71歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yolande de Dampierre于1324年出生在法国福藍德 福藍薩时，她的父亲Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle49岁，母亲Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany28岁。她于从1352年到1353年与Philippe de Navarre Comte de Longueville结婚。她去世于1395年12月13日享年71岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Yolande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Yolanda
meanings: Of uncertain origin. It is found in Old French as Yolande , of which this is a Latinate form. It may be ultimately of Germanic origin, but if so it has been altered beyond recognition. It is also sometimes identified with the name of St Jolenta ( d. 1298 ), daughter of the king of Hungary.

en.lifeSummary: When Yolande de Dampierre was born in 1324, in French Flanders, France, her father, Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle, was 49 and her mother, Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany, was 28. She married Philippe de Navarre Comte de Longueville from 1352 to 1353. She died on 13 December 1395, at the age of 71, and was buried in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yolande de Dampierre est née en 1324, à Flandre française, France, son père, Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Philippe de Navarre Comte de Longueville du 1352 au 1353. Elle est décédée le 13 décembre 1395, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Yolande de Dampierre 1324 in Flandre française, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle 49 und ihre Mutter Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany 28. Sie hat von 1352 bis 1353 Philippe de Navarre Comte de Longueville geheiratet. Sie starb am 13. Dezember 1395 im Alter von 71 Jahren und wurde in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de Dampierre è nata il nel 1324 nel Flandre française, Francia, sua padre, Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Philippe de Navarre Comte de Longueville da 1352 a 1353. Morì il 13 dicembre 1395, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Yolande de Dampierreが1324年にフランスフランダー フランcアイゼで生まれた時，父Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marleは49歳，母Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittanyは28歳であった。から1352年まで1353年にPhilippe de Navarre Comte de Longuevilleと結婚した。彼女は1395年12月13日に71歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Yolande de Dampierre(이)가 1324년 프랑스 플랜드르 프랜c아이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1352년 부터 1353년 까지 Philippe de Navarre Comte de Longueville(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1395년 12월 13일 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de Dampierre nasceu em 1324, em Flandre française, França, seu pai, Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Philippe de Navarre Comte de Longueville de 1352 a 1353. Ela faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1395, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yolande de Dampierre родилась в 1324 г. в местности фландр франcеис, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philippe de Navarre Comte de Longueville с 1352 по 1353. Она умерла 13 декабря 1395 г. в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция.

sm.Bet. 1352–1353: mai le 1352 e o'o I le 1353

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Yolande de Dampierre nació en 1324, en Flandre française, Francia, su papá, Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Philippe de Navarre Comte de Longueville desde 1352 hasta 1353. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1395, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.
